reviews.review_title: Great game, not so great players
reviews.review_description: I gave this game another chance after already having issues with being able to grab your different weapons and other things being glitchy. I turned my audio to only party last time thinking it automatically stayed that way. I was wrong and someone that was a higher level started to harass me because I didn’t have armor like him. That usually wouldn’t bother me and I continued on with what I was doing, but he followed me and continued commenting. I was eventually fed up and said to leave me alone with a few choice words after the harassment. I hope you guys can monitor the harassment before people get fed up and stop playing.

My personal experience is overall Great
Don't listen to bad reviews.
Imagine this game is free.. and it's this good
I be seen 20€ games that are not even worth being free
I love the idea of creating your own class bcs u have access to all class talent trees, mechanics of the game is unique( but u need some training in stressed situations),open world, dungeons, I love it after few hours I'm lvl 9 and didn't run into any bugs, or seen any harassment..
Creators are trying to make this game great and even they had some financial problems I believe they can make it

I understand that this is an early access title, but somehow the players are already toxic and aggressive. I was hoping to get my girlfriend and close friend to join me in an mmo but unfortunately kept getting harassed by a "youtuber" who wouldn't leave my gf alone. He just kept following her and harassing her about being a low level, and when she told him to leave her alone he started recording and reported her for racism. We tried to tell him to leave us alone but then proceeded to report us for racism though nobody says anything remotely racist or offensive. I hope the developers actually read this and and look through their reports to see what actually happened, until then i guess we'll just go back to playing normal multiplayer games like Dungeons of Eternity or dead/dying mmos like zenith. It's a real shame that toxic youtubers are probably going to ruin this game's chance of finding the player base it needs to become successful

developer_response.body:
Hi Chibas! Thank you for taking the time to write this. This is something we take very seriously, and to address the recent issue we've had with several players we took a pause and released a new Player Ignore function to help manage this in addition to the user reporting form. I hope you can return to check us back out, you can read more about the new player ignore on our discord, or directly on our blog here: https://www.ilysiavr.com/dev-blog/preparing-for-ptr-releasespan-fe9bz-bcmd4-dyewn-45ky8-8watb-nwpsl-jg3jy-xgr4w-pwgj9-bf32b-l3tsg-dre2t-hm3x4-6srrk-88js9-phc7r-2t345-gb2jn-p43jx-3yk2z-6e4da-5fmft-fhhk3-dx9ht-ltjea-2tt5p

Thank you again and we're sorry this happened!

reviews.review_description: Wow this game is neat and Id bump to a 4 or 5 if the frame rate was fixed. Currently its un playable head ache for me. I am on Quest 3 with Game Optimizer. The inventory stutters, the graphics stutter, and it runs at 25 to 32 fps. its unfortunate because i really want to play this game and I tried in spite if the bad frame rate but i cant do it. It hurts my head to try anymore. I hope the performance can be fixed. Any other bugs i could look past but this needs to be addressed if the game is going to continue.

reviews.review_title: fix ts alr stop adding pointless stuff
reviews.review_description: The game could be awesome but its just stuck being annoying asf the waydar has a range of 2 feet the fall damage is a buggy pos that will kill you if you walk wrong, the quests don't give nearly enough description past lvl 10 and the waydar doesn't help either because it doesn't give any of the actual questing location of the quest and its an extreme pain. Combat is also buggy the new igara don't take damage (at least to my spell) and then I'm stuck with my stats lowered for an eternity because of that death debuff. The game is fun when you're not dealing with the horrible casting system that doesn't know any spell other than magic shield or wtv that spell was called and the rest of the buggy bs. The xp amounts for quests are awful nobody that's right in the head whats to do EVERY quest to be able to get close to max level. Instead of adding those useless town guards y'all could've fixed hotboxes, magic casting, reworked enemies so theyre not just some reskinned bs.

developer_response.body: Hey there! Thank you for the feedback, we have released a couple new updates this past week that directly address bugs in the WayDar with quests not showing (especially turn in quests), the Igara mobs have been fixed to take full damage from skill based attacks and not just basic ones, and we have replaced the casting system with a much more reliable system. I hope you come back and check out the updates!

reviews.review_title: a wow type VR game Wow like
Loving this game keep adding more 🙏🏻
reviews.review_description: Games awesome. Been looking for an mmorpg for the vr. Been playing this before it became free. Really Been enjoying it. Hope they continue to make updates regularly. Can't wait to see what this game evolves into. Only thing I'm hoping they put in is pvp eventually and keep adding more stuff.

Experiencing breaking bugs like: Weapons disappearing, taking damage from bumps in terrain, summons deciding to not attack or attack allies, falling out of the map, etc.

Lots of annoyances like the poor map, items not slotting correctly, instability sending you flying through the air, magic casting at seemingly random (even when tracing the book because the actual symbols don't match) to the point that the game will cast a completely different spell instead of the most similar. The spellcasting is bad enough that I have to make my own shortcuts that look very different. For example, a spiral (bless spell) casts self heal. This means spellcasting is hit by three limiters: the questionable casting, the cooldown, and mana. Note this ignores other things like bugs. There is also a lack of skill choices, forcing you to return to the starter town repeatedly to swap skills.

Another issue is the backpack zipper is very finicky and it can be annoying to get to the page you want.

These are just some issues experienced.

Note that there are some good, such as ...  The comms work. And skills are reasonably flexible.

developer_response.body:
Hi NolAndVoyd,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback!

Over the past month, we’ve released several updates that address some of the issues you mentioned. This includes fully replacing the rune casting system with a more reliable version, fixing the terrain damage issue, and resolving Waydar problems that caused quest objectives to not display properly.

We are still actively improving, and feedback like yours does help us focus in on issues. We hope you’ll consider giving the game another shot as we continue making updates!

You can also follow our latest updates in Discord or on our dev blog here: https://www.ilysiavr.com/dev-blog

reviews.review_description:
I came to this game to find something to replace orbusvr even tho I didn't really play it I was planning on playing It but then I heard they were closing the online servers. I think this game has the potential to bring back the MMO VR population, and in all I believe that they could make a really good game that replaces orbusvr and zenith. The game has bad voice chat, combat, and there is no map. Unless I'm crazy and there is then I'm just hating for no reason. Let me get to the stuff they need to fix!

1: Make the voice chat more stable, I'm on quest 3 and every time I get near someone the game decides to cut all my audio then a few seconds later it's back.

2: Make more servers, I only saw one in us east.

3: I think making a better UI and backpack is the best choice.

4: The bow has an issue where if I put my head too close to the bow I can't see the line anymore.

5: Stop updating the game if you're not gonna fix the buggy crap first. No one's gonna be mad if you take your time to polish the game before you release new things to the game!

Thank you for listening to me yap
You turn on the game and the illusion of a fairy-tale world appears in which you find yourself.
I have been playing since the start and have enjoyed it

A couple of years ago I played OrbusVR and I was hoping to find something similar or better and this game met my expectations. It is a vast open world mmorpg which you can choose different weapons and classes. Love the style and I can't wait to play more!
I love MMORPGs and seeing a VRMMORPG warmed my heart. The only thing I would change is: remove the logout button (Sword Art Online reference ✅)
Great Game really I’m trying to be a healer but I haven’t played it enough to give it a 5 stars and you should be able to sell stuff and trade with other people And transfer gold

reviews.review_title: Early Access MMO in active development
reviews.review_description:
Not why people are leaving negative comments about a free game in early access having bugs. 
Anyone in the discord community knows that they are constantly taking feedback and responding with weekly updates as well as adding all the features they promised over the years. 
I think any fan of the genre looking for a real mmorpg will find this game really fun. Plus it's free right now, so it's worth a try. I have lots of fun with my friends who play.
Plus they just updated their privacy options so you aren't stuck dealing with anyone you don't get along with. 
Lots of hours of free fun here. And there's of lots of helpful friendly people willing to give advice to newcomers!

reviews.review_title: PLAYED AFTER 6+ MONTHS OF NOT PLAYING.
reviews.review_description:
After coming back to this game from the first time I played, this game has done a full 180. 
First time playing was boring, hard to navigate and just wasn't fun.
After playing last night for the first time in over 6 months, I played well over 3 hours and couldn't get enough. 
The game still has some little issues but nothing that is crazy. Im engaged the whole time and the people I came across were friendly and wanting to team up to complete quests.

Keep up the great work, also I paid for this game when it came out!

reviews.review_title: Potentially promising but I grow dubious
reviews.review_description:
Until some core gameplay hurdles and performance issues are addressed I would personally avoid.  A smooth and reliable gameplay experience should be their starting point but they seem to be neglecting that and instead focusing on new content and the addition of these micro transactions.

For example the VR backpack and a player inventory / wardrobe are a gimmick that more often than not impede's gameplay.  Versus just having an functional inventory screen like Orbus had.  It functions but it's finicky and more often than not is a headache.  It's not immersive if you have to be constantly frustrated by basic interface element.

There's also been a persistent jitter of the interface when turning/moving, there hasn't been any indication that this is being fixed and has been present since the beginning.  This could make the game nearly unplayable for some people.  I log in every 6 months to see if it's been fixed but so far no luck.  If by some miracle it has been fixed you can disregard this, but I'm not holding my breath and it's going to be a while before I check again.

Long and short it showed initial promise but has kind of stagnated, likely funding or manpower issue.  It very well may be another in the bin of was released too early and was too ambitious for the developers involved.

At the moment I kind of have my hopes on Evermoor just because of the experience of the developers and what I've seen so far.  I can only hope that they don't do the Early Access buggy mess release that has plagued the vrmmo's to date......but who knows.


I would really like to endorse this game, but I purchased it before it went free and I just haven't seen enough meaningful improvements to the core play experience.  Updates have been few and far between.

UPDATE JAN 2026
It’s been a year since I last played the game, so I thought I’d give it another try. It’s STILL in early access, and STILL has all the exact same problems that immediately turned me off before. If the devs have worked on this game at all, they’ve done NOTHING to actually make the game playable. 

1. Still janky and jerky CONSTANTLY every few seconds
2. Character creation bugs all through the interface. 
3. STILL no teleport movement! Come on, seriously?!

FEB 2025
Only smooth movement. Hard pass. Real shame. Yeah, early access, but how do you not have basic features that were part of your predecessors like Orbus and Zenith for years?

reviews.review_title: Nowhere near where it should be
reviews.review_description:
I've been following this for years eagerly awaiting it's release and news just stopped and noone was talking about it so i figured it died. Then the free to play announcement came so i jumped in to test it out now that it went free and I gotta say I am so glad I didn't purchase it earlier. This does not look like a game that is 5+ years in development and 2 into early access. 

The basic functions don't work properly, picking things up and interacting with them is difficult because the box to do it is SO SMALL that you spend a couple minutes trying to put something in your bag, I had a quest not give me the reward, the frame rate is jumpy, the controls are super clunky and unintuitive, the movement is really stiff and slow (if you like fast hit and run melee strikers that isn't really possible here). 

All in all, try it if you want since it's free but I'm not hopeful it will be decently playable since they are trying to add new content rather than fix the basic mechanical issues.

I gave it 2 stars rather than 1 just because of the idea and potential it could possibly have, I just don't see it reaching that potential based on what we have over 5 years in.
It’s got a lot of potential but the game feels kinda empty so it still needs some work but other than that the game is lots of fun
the tuitorail didnt feel liek it taught me as much as i would of needed to know, and theres a bit of lag present. Its got great bones. Ill update my reveiw once im a bit futher into the game.

When entering your name on the keyboard in the game is a huge challenge you know they failed. Keys not always registering and often enter double letters. Trying to get capital letters but the shift key just activates and deactivate.I have been alpha tester in MMORPGs before but never seen any in this bad shape. I tried going through the tutorial in the beginning but everything just felt so bad that I gave up. I know this is early release but things like working keyboard are not super hard too do, can even be downloaded for free in unity store. Please at least make the first 10 minutes of gameplay working.

reviews.review_title: Great job, devs! Please keep updating it
reviews.review_description:
I really enjoy playing Ilysia VR!  
Even though it’s still in development, it already has a lot to offer. I love that I can create different characters and change my skills to fit my playstyle. It’s fun, magical, and feels like a true fantasy adventure.

Can’t wait to see where this game goes next.

I see so much potential here that whatever bugs I may encounter or rough edges I am aware of. I think this is going to be the game I've been waiting for. Im excited to be here early enough to watch this community grow. Thanks team! Great job! Keep up the good work!

DA BEST VR GAME EVER MADE!

SOMEBODY GET THESE DEVS AN AWARD🔥￼

Had such high hopes for this game, but so little thought went in to the sword and healer classes that it wasn’t worth it. The crafting system was just a token thing also there’s no real incentive for lifestyle players to bother. I get that it’s in development and still has a ways to go so hopefully checking in later these things are fixed but it’s more of a casual hang out
Even for being in active development, this is my "go to" game. I love the freedom to specialize cross-class and being able to wear whichever gear I choose. Can't wait for more updates!

This game is incredible and my only disappointment is that I didn't find it sooner. Meta needs to fix their store algorithm lol. If you like WoW or Runescape, this is the game for you. Ita crazy because I keep hearing people say that open map games can't be done on standalone, yet you have amazing games like this. The devs seem very active and engaged as well. 10/10 from me

Game is decent and so far the only wow type mmorpg for the quest... I wish they would fix the bugs, so far I've noticed that both Smite and Arcane Bolt are both bugged! They will cast thru the enemy and do 0 DMG. If they would make more of a effort to fix things this game would be awesome.

developer_response.body: Hi Manic! We just patched that today on 11/3! I hope you can come back and check us out!

reviews.review_description: I went in and had no clue what to do but I think it has good potential ￼

When I first played, I was confused, didn't know what to do but people are the most friendly people I have ever come across in a game community, the people that helped are the reason why i love the game so much. It seems very bleak after you get through the start but when you get taught things, it opens up worlds of stuff. All sorts of cool things you can learn about. The people are amazing and so is the game, as well as the concept in and of itself. The devs have done an amazing job so far and is so much potential with this game. I see no reason to not give this game 5 stars considering how cool it is, in early access.

So, I'd had my eye on this game for a few months, as one of the things I'd really wanted since getting the VR headset was a decent MMORPG, but I hadn't really been sure at the time when I actually had money for it, so I waited. To my surprise, I checked on the store for MMOs again and saw it was now free to play! So, I downloaded it and so far it's pretty enjoyable. It has a big world so far, even with it still being in early access, and it sounds like they're going to be adding more locations to travel to at some point, so it's got me excited for what's to come. I'd recommend this game.
some tiny bugs are not so important to say that this is one of most exciting game I've ever played, everyone must try
It’s a great game it reminds me of skyreim the Xbox version .It could use a bigger place to go different lands  on the ships and eat food .

I'm really enjoying Ilysia.  The quests and story

 lines are fun and interesting.   I know there are some bugs, but don't most games have some?  The community itself is very helpful.   I would recommend this game for those who enjoy social games.

reviews.review_title: Great game with a great community!
reviews.review_description: Seriously, this game has it all! Really bring me world of Warcraft vibes. I have met the best friends on this game, everyone is so helpful and fun here!! The newest update brought pets!! (That was the icing on the cake for this gal! ;) ) I currently roam around the hills with my round lil cub Pooh seeking adventure and new friends! Hope to meet you there!! 💕🙌🐻

Love this game. Glad i stuck with it when. Great community and devs are aresome working hard to give players what they want. Devs listen to us and keep on delivering. I hope this game stands the test of time and continues to grow. Will definitely continue to support it. Thank to the devs for your hard work to put out a title like this. 👏👏👏👏

I’ve wanted an mmo in vr for a while and stumbled upon this game recently. Couldn’t understand how I didn’t know this game existed and then learned it’s newly free to play.

Great mmo experience, feels so much like I’m playing classic wow but in vr. Doesn’t seem like a ton of content yet but an awesome base that I can’t wait to see evolve

reviews.review_title: This could be the next big VR MMO.
reviews.review_description: I've been having so much fun playing Ilysia. I'm a battlemage in the game and the spellcasting is really cool. I feel like a real caster. I've been taking my time leveling up and doing extra things like cooking, fishing, and crafting gear. I really enjoy finding new fishing spots and just taking in the scenary. It's a really pretty game. I'm really excited for the future of this MMO. At this point, I would buy any DLC they put out just so I could enjoy the world some more.

This game was okay and I was trying my best to really get into it and enjoy it but there is only one server and I have only seen 3 people in the days I have played.. now don't believe all the paid five stars the game is Far from good atm. You need to teleport to beginner town to upgrade skills, you have weapons that say they do damage but if you aren't using a skill they only hit for 1hp, the list goes On and On.. has the potential to be good but there system needs a major rework before it's ever worth even a 2 star in my opinion. Needs to be more for the player, not the devs trying to show how one sided they can make a game.

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thank you for your feedback! I wanted to respond to a few of the points you made.

We currently have our public test realm open for players to come test our upcoming content release. It features a higher level cap, new content, and quests, as well as a handful of new features like more advanced enemy hitboxes with damage zones and spirit walking. Because these exciting changes are on the public test realm, most of our active player base is playing on the test build and servers over the past couple weeks. This has the unfortunate side effect of leaving the main live server quite empty at times.

We've had a handful of players express frustrations with our current one way teleport system, this is something we'll continue to iterate on especially as we start to introduce new regions. Very much noted!

Non-skill attacks (basic attacks) on mobs do damage based on a handful of factors. The stats of the weapon, your stats as a player, and new in our test server: where you hit them. What you’re experiencing with the 1 damage popup is that we also have a system under the hood that we intended to discourage players from spamming attacks or "wiggling" their sword inside of enemies. You if space your attacks out a bit more, your weapons will do full damage per swing.

Thank you again for your feedback! It helps us learn about what things need changes! We would love to hear more from you in our community discord!

reviews.review_title: It’s ok but I see the potential
reviews.review_description: The game heavily reminds me of world of Warcraft and is pretty neat, it’s still pretty clunky at this point, i’ve been stuck about three times now and had to log out and log back in because there’s no “ get unstuck” button.  Right now I’m stuck on a quest called investigation because I don’t know where to go. The “ salute to sea quest objectives.” feature is awesome, but it doesn’t work all the time and doesn’t show you where the question objectives are every time in the case of this investigation quest it does not ever show up.  I wasn’t ready to make this review yet, but I wanted to report these issues to the devs, but didn’t know how.  I’ll continue playing and watching for a base to see if there improves and should it greatly improve I will increase my writing greatly.

developer_response.body: Hi Camosnake! Thank you for checking us out! Our 'unstuck' button is in the Codex options page called 'Return to Graveyard', if you get stuck in the future it will teleport you to the nearest one. I'm sorry you're stuck on Investigation! The Quest objectives only show up when you get near enough to the region specified in the text of the quest. If you get stuck, wander around a bit and see if you can get the icon to pop up on the Waydar! Thanks again!

reviews.review_title: Making it free didn't make it less jank
reviews.review_description:
I paid for this game a year ago, hoping that since it was in early access it would get better. It did not. and now to give the middle finger to everyone who did actually pay for this game they've made it free kama so not only is it junky and barely playable it's flooded with children like every other free quest game,

Before we had a jank paid mmo that was really an awful game but at the least it was a refuge from all of the children screaming racial slurs. Now it has those too. i've installed this game a dozen different times since purchasing it, and it's never gotten to a playable state. Adding free players will only increase server costs without doing anything to help the seven pay for an actual programmer to come in and fix this wreck.

I'm sure after spitting in the face of everyone who paid for this game, and filling the server with screaming racist children, the server won't be around long anyway.

This is a great MMO with the ability to group up and chat with other players. The game is addictive, it's a shame there is only one dungeon though it was fun for a group. There have been setbacks but it is growing in content with each update.

Fix the spell casting drawing, it's not working at all ! I already wanna quit the game because of that.

Edit: i'm changing for a 5 stars, but i'm still having issues with some casting !

Ex: i have no problem at all casting the bear (triangle) but i can't cast the mage shield (which is also a triangle)

Other than that (and a LOT of bugs), i love the game !

developer_response.body: Hi HashBeKa! Sorry to hear that the spell casting isn't working for you! Would you be willing to join our Discord and share which items are not working? We're very active with our community and would love to know more so we can help you! Thank you so much for checking us out and I hope you continue to play!

reviews.review_title: Really looking forward to this game
reviews.review_description: Lots of potential, fully stylized UI, and with a nostalgic Runescape vibe. Some mechanics are strange but easy to get used to, It's exciting to see how wide a range of skills can be learned. Two thing I think is crucial for improvement is: 1- Hand movements and gestures. The finger animations don't match the actual button presses, which makes gesture interactions very confusing, requiring a movement completely opposite to the in game gesture. 2- Proximity Voice Chat. This feels as if there is a bubble around the player, in which if another player is inside it in any position, my character will hear their voice from all sides (mono) and from no distance (Non-positional audio). I think this gets too confusing in lobbies with a considerable number of players, sometimes being a bit overwhelming.
I played this game to find out u cant play it or at least i cant

developer_response.body: Hi Muffin! Sorry, our servers were down for a bit, they're back now and I hope you come back and give it a try!

reviews.review_title: Using sword and shield is garbage
reviews.review_description: The hit boxes are on one part of the bodies of enemies. Making it impossible to play sword and shield in this game. Basically unplayable.
This takes me back to my first time playing world of Warcraft! It’s really awesome to feel that in VR! The community is awesome and updates keep coming! Lots of potential for sure!
I love this game and it looks like they're trying to go in the right direction but it needs more content and players, maybe in time it could become something great
Lots of in depth mechanics, havent met anyone toxic in all my time of playing (5 days), lots of potential. 5 stars yeehoo
the game feels so unpolished it feels like devs didnt even try and im on quest 3

developer_response.body: Hi 4natra, thank you for checking us out. I hope you can come check us again and you have a better experience. Unfortunately, during the time you played, we've had an issue with intentional abuse of an bug which brings performance down for everyone on the server and drops frames to almost 0, and have recieved multiple complaints about it. We are aware of the bug, and have a patch for it coming. I do hope you'll give us another shot, and join our Discord as we interact regularly with the community there and collect feedback. Regardless, thank you for the time!

reviews.review_description: Fun game, good direction if they keep going, I got to max level in few days with some groups, good community and potential for early access! Looking forward to more
This has the potential to be just as big or bigger than zenith was can't wait to see what they do with it

I saw players talking badly about this game. But it is a very good game. Maybe the best MMO RPG on Quest currently.  Guilds, quests, dungeons everything you want. Major update coming soon. YOU MUST TRY IT. YOU WILL LOVE IT!! JOIN "The Helping Hand" guild!
This a great mmorpg game.  I love playing and learning the different classes

reviews.review_title: New update has extended levels past 10
reviews.review_description: Gameplay has been great up to now but with the influx of levels has also caused an influx of players to grind out new quests and areas.
One of the best VR games ever.  I hope the updates role out quicker that how it is currently.

reviews.review_title: New update makes it fun to play again
reviews.review_description:
It's definitely still an early access title, but a great slice of what we can expect to see in the future

There are bugs and placeholder elements and a general lack of polish, but whether playing solo or with a full party of 5, the game actually feels like an MMO now

If you want to support the development, purchase the game now or you can wait for f2p to arrive
Its a rly good game
The game is fun, I like the race options, the classes, and the sprinting, the fishing is also nice.

This game has become so fantastic with the new update. It’s giving classic WoW vibes, and I’m so happy to be in this new epic world. Played for as long as my battery would last, and had a blast. There is so much to do, but it is well explained how to do things. Thank you so much to the devs!!
Good game nice environment only issue for me is the fps and fps jitter

reviews.review_title: Amazing! A must play for MMO fans!
reviews.review_description:
Ilysia is an absolutely amazing VR experience that has quickly become one of my favorite games. The world is truly massive and beautifully designed, offering endless opportunities to explore, craft, and connect. The level of character customization is impressive, allowing players to really make their hero their own.

Even as a new player, I’ve already discovered so much to do—crafting, cooking, fishing, combat, and countless missions—and it feels like I’ve only scratched the surface. Every session offers something new to experience.

What really stands out, though, is the community. The players are welcoming, helpful, and genuinely passionate about the game. Whenever I’ve had a question or needed help, there’s always been someone willing to lend a hand.

I’ve enjoyed Ilysia so much that I’ve already recommended it to friends and family so we can all experience this adventure together. If you’re looking for a VR MMO that delivers depth, creativity, and camaraderie, Ilysia is absolutely worth your time.

reviews.review_title: This is actually the best VRMMORPG
reviews.review_description: This game is fun!! The graphics aren't bad, the combat is fun and engaging, the game feels fully finished too! The classing options are awesome and creative as well. This game is a 5 star!
This would have been a great game if you could have an option to play solo

developer_response.body: Thank you for checking us out! Although MMOs do generally catered to multiplayer experiences, we do want to empower solo play in Ilysia! We offer options to mute other players, leave chat channels, etc and designed encounters and required quests to be solo-able (even main story like making killing a boss no required, or putting a challenging fight in a public area) You're not alone, lots of people who enjoy MMOs prefer to be able to do things alone. Reviews like yours help guide other players, so we’d be grateful if you gave it another try and considered updating your review once you’ve had the chance to experience the solo playstyle to find the things you like. Thanks so much!

reviews.review_description: Love it so much cant wait for new level cap

It really feels like the Devs are cooking something here. Currently the max lvl is 10 with one dungeon. The Dungeon drops some pretty awesome loot that looks like raid gear. Most of the players are really helpful. They helped me do quests. You can be invited to their guild, and help lvl up the guild as you kill things to unlock perks.

   In terms of professions it currently has Cooking, mining, smithing, and fishing from what I've seen. If you like to make more than one character, you will definitely have enough content for $15. Currently there are 4 classes to choose from. Martial(tank with sword and shield), mystic(dps with wand), Holy(healer with Staff), and warden(dps with bow) Martials, and Mystics are able to duel wield. Wardens can have pets to help fight.
Installed the Game today. It is not working because my version is not the newest. No Update available... What can I do?

developer_response.body: Hi de5ert! I'm sorry this is happening! Were you in our PTR per chance? If your client is set to PTR still, it won't lauch or have an update available as the PTR is currently offline. If not, and you're on the Live version please join our discord and let us know there so we can help you directly! Thank you!

reviews.review_title: So far, a very good start!🤞it's cooking
reviews.review_description:
A very good start in my opinion, updates are coming according to the devs on discord! This is one to watch! 
The community has been awesome btw. Not the usual toxic bs!

I highly recommend checking it out for yourself!
Honestly having so much fun
Before I say anything, do you have to buy this game in the full release?

This game is only in its early access phase is already so great!
It bring back memories from when I used to love playing MMO RPG games!
I have played all of the MMO RPG games that the VR world have the offer and yet this is the best game out there in the genre!

Good job devs you are doing an amazing work!

Definitely a fun mmorpg it's in early access, so atm can only level up to 10 but there is cooking, cooking recipes, mining, crafting , weapons making, and fishing. Also there is a dungeon run you can do for dungeon armor and gear. I say for the price it's pretty great. You also get to see what comes in the future for this game too. They also got a discord you can join the community is pretty friendly too. Would recommend 10 out of 10.

Even after this major update, the game is still an absolute disappointment, combat is still underwhelming, still no sign of backer rewards being implemented, the skill trees are still underwhelming, and the voice acting is either done by people with zero experience or practice when it comes to VA, or it's AI. I think my over all opinion of the game has actually gone down from this update. I disliked the launch of the game because it ignored feedback from the beta (which was already a step down from the alpha) and rushed to release, and I feel that this update was hyped up to be a big overhaul when it is just as poor of a tutorial with just as little to actually catch a new player.

Edit: Upon confirmation that the game uses AI voices, I have bumped my rating down from 2 stars to 1.

developer_response.body:
HI there! We appreciate you taking the time to leave detailed feedback, even if it’s tough to read. Ilysia is still in Early Access, and we're continually improving it. This update was a major rebuild from the ground up for us, overhauling UI, combat calculations, skills functionality, adding crafting, redesigning party systems, questing mechanics, instancing, and XP progression. Totally understand not every system will resonate with every player yet, but there’s more depth and content coming throughout 2025.

Regarding AI voice acting, you are 100% right! We've been open about that in our Discord. We're a small studio and currently relying on placeholder AI voices currently which allows us to focus our funds on development, but we absolutely want to replace these with actual Voice actors as soon as we are able to!

Thanks again for giving the game a shot. We hear you, and we’ll keep pushing to improve! 
If you haven't yet, please join our Discord at https://discord.gg/ilysia to meet fellow adventurers, share feedback, check out the latest updates and be part of shaping Ilysia’s future!

reviews.review_title: Finally starting to feel like a VRMMO!!
reviews.review_description: I bought this many many months ago and after a few hours of playing I realized it wasn’t quite fleshed out enough to be worth putting many hours into even for an early access title, but I could definitely see the potential so I’ve been keeping an eye on the updates and patch notes and after this last update it’s really starting to feel like a decent VRMMO. I hope the devs keep fleshing it out with content like this last update because if they do this game will be awesome and HUGE!

Key Suggestions

Timed social events: Introduce world events (e.g., “Help the farmer gather eggs”) that reward group participation and foster in-game communities.

Interactive forging mini-game: Replace the current click-to-forge mechanic with a timing- or skill-based mini-game to transform ore into ingots.

Expanded recipe list: Add more craftable items and professions so players can master diverse trades beyond basic armor and weaponsmithing.

Realistic combat: Build on the recent overhaul by adding weight, stamina costs, and parry mechanics to make melee encounters more immersive.

Polish mission text: Fix the bug at the anvil where the NPC’s request for copper ores still mentions iron in the mission description.

P.S make the fishing more fun, its quite annoying in its current stage and make more things climbable like trees or mountains

developer_response.body: Thank you for leaving such a thorough review! If you haven't yet, please join our Discord at https://discord.gg/ilysia to meet fellow adventurers, share feedback, check out the latest updates and be part of shaping Ilysia’s future!

reviews.review_description: This game is so slow. Travel from point A to point B. Takes forever. I found a glitch I had to ask discord for help. They said couldn't be fixed. But it wouldn't let me proceed to next challenges till completed. So I was stuck in a game were my progression could go no further. Because of games fault. What a waste
I know game is still in Early Access but for. VR MMO you can feel how much potential it has and with major content coming in next few months i can see this game exploding

reviews.review_title: I thought to give it a try but …
reviews.review_description: Graphic is not blowing me away, gameplay is horrible, fighting a monster feels terrible. The idea is not bad bad tho mmo is so 1990. Cannot see any change or upgrade. 🤣😂 you guys have really a lot of work to do. At the moment 10 euro lost money.  System Crash every 10 minutes, only 1 American server… not even a server in Europe. So bad.after new update it feels still early Access , dont like the gameplay. It’s a Pitty that there is no refund. Money blown away 😩😩😩

developer_response.body:
Hi there!
Thanks for giving Ilysia a shot! We value the feedback, even when it's hard to hear. Firstly, we're sorry you didn't like the game and that your time was unfortunately beyond the refund window Meta forces (more than 2 hours of playtime). We appreciate you taking the time you did.

Since our original launch, we’ve rebuilt Ilysia from the ground up: revamped UI, changed combat, added crafting, fixed instancing, new quest types, XP balancing, a proper party system, and more. It’s still Early Access, and there’s plenty we’re working on, including expanding regional servers and continuing to polish combat and performance!

Thanks again, and hopefully we can win you back in a future update! 
If you haven't yet, please join our Discord at https://discord.gg/ilysia to meet fellow adventurers, share feedback, check out the latest updates and be part of shaping Ilysia’s future!

reviews.review_description: Crappy systems, horrible graphics, the voices sound ai with barely any emotion, even most mobile games have better voice acting, the fact this game somehow even has a player base shocks me considering how horrible it is

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Since you last played, Ilysia has had major updates! We overhauled core systems, visuals, performance, and content. In March 2025, we launched the Tides of Corruption update, rebuilding the foundation to better reflect our vision for a VR MMORPG. We’re still in Early Access and actively developing with community feedback. We’d love for you to jump back in, see what’s new, and join us on Discord (https://discord.gg/ilysia) to stay updated and share your thoughts! Hope you give us another shot!
